self_improvement.claim: Directive Workspace can present queue lifecycle status more truthfully when broken completed entries are explicitly downgraded instead of rendered as clean completion.
self_improvement.mechanism: This DEEP bounded result adds one derived queue lifecycle-status guard for completed entries whose canonical resolution is broken.
self_improvement.baseline_observation: Before this slice, queue entries kept showing raw completed status even when their recorded completion artifact could not be resolved by canonical truth.
self_improvement.expected_effect: The queue surface will stop overstating completed work for broken entries while preserving raw queue evidence and healthy routed entries.

decision.rationale: This bounded queue lifecycle-status slice adds immediate whole-product truth value without broadening into queue lifecycle sync or generic stale-status repair.
decision.runtime_threshold_check: yes - the mechanism is still valuable without a runtime surface, so Architecture should retain product-owned value
